subcodes.first_line: The false hath ever misled, and will continue to mislead, mankind in the name of truth. O ye that quaff the wine of inner meaning, be ye aware [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم یزل و لایزال باطل باسم حق ناس را گمراه نمود ای شاربان رحیق معانی آگاه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
